attacking_style: Not a primary attacker. Functions as a high-speed leadout specialist capable of exceptional acceleration in final kilometers, though lacks finishing punch to contest sprints himself.
team_tactics: Deployed as leadout architect for UAE sprints, using unconventional positioning (right-middle rather than traditional trains) to deliver at maximum speed into final meters.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint stages where pure wattage and positioning skills maximize effectiveness. Exposed on terrain requiring sustained climbing or tactical finesse in breakaways.
vulnerability: Limited ability to control or drop quality sprinters in late-race scenarios. Pure power insufficient without tactical positioning advantages in contested situations.
key_patterns: Exceptional leadout speed delivery for UAE sprinters through non-traditional positioning (2023).
Accelerations fail to distance quality opposition without positional advantages (2021, 2023).
Functions as tactical architect rather than finisher in sprint setups.
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Vuelta showed refined leadout execution with tactical innovation, suggesting evolution into specialized high-level domestique role
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 19
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 12
